proposed_relations.description: B44 Limited is being replaced by B44 SBS on the Nostrand Avenue/Rogers Avenue corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-sbs already exists in the registry with aliases route_b44-sbs-2010-cb3 and source 2010_05_11_brt_nostrand_cb3. Observation resolves to its own base_record_id, so decision is new. Raw text supports predecessor relation from route_b44-limited to route_b44-sbs.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before
B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-local already exists in the registry with aliases route_b44-local-2010-cb3 and source 2010_05_11_brt_nostrand_cb3. Observation resolves to its own base_record_id, so decision is new. do_not_merge_pairs confirms route_b44-local is distinct from route_b44-sbs.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Local will continue as before
